source: Etherscan v2 account txlist, offset=10000, sort=desc, local Curve decision=cover chainId=1 addresses only
limitations: Queries only current local cover addresses from registryV2/surface/curve/_deployments.json.
Does not close full Curve pool universe; P0 pool universe inventory remains required before full P2 real-tx sweep.
Etherscan account txlist returns normal transactions only, not internal calls/logs/events.
